ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., M, L, 1X) */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart the size belongs to */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., US 10, US 12) */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size equivalent */,
  "bust_range" TEXT /* Range for bust measurement (in cm) */,
  "waist_range" TEXT /* Range for waist measurement (in cm) */,
  "hips_range" TEXT /* Range for hips measurement (in cm) */,
  "shoulder_range" TEXT /* Range for shoulder measurement (in cm) */,
  "sleeve_length_range" TEXT /* Range for sleeve length measurement (in cm) */,
  "inseam_range" TEXT /* Range for inseam measurement (in cm) (for pants and shorts) */,
  "thigh_range" TEXT /* Range for thigh measurement (in cm) (for pants and shorts) */,
  "rise_range" TEXT /* Range for rise measurement (in cm) (for pants and shorts) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart (e.g., Women's Tops, Men's Pants) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category the size chart belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the size chart belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the size chart is applicable to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size chart is designed for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the size chart is designed for (e.g., Adult, Kids, Teen) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the region (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code used in the region (e.g., en, fr) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the size chart */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the version became effective */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., Draft, Active, Archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_versions_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the size chart */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the document belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_documents_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_documents_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the unit (e.g., cm, in) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the unit was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., bust, waist, hips) */,
  "measurement_value" TEXT /* Value of the measurement (e.g., 94~102) */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit used for the measurement */,
  "measurement_description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is archived */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_comments_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
